hero.subtitle: The corporate habit platform with peer validation.

steps.title: Create a team
steps.description: Invite the people you want to grow with. It can be your partner, your family, your co-founders or your work team.

steps.title: Define your habits
steps.description: Choose what you want to do together every day. Exercise, reading, meditation, deep work — whatever makes sense for you.

steps.title: Check in every day
steps.description: A quick check when you complete it. Everyone sees real-time progress and the team streak only grows when everyone participates.

features.title: Everything you need.
list: Create shared habits with your team or family
Real-time daily tracking for all members
Group streaks that only hold when everyone participates
Up to 10 active habits per team on the free plan
Progressive web app, works on any device

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No surprises. No mandatory annual payments.

footer.tagline: Build habits that last, with the people who matter.
